response.text:

rationale: Your SoC (0.40) is below our minimum sharing threshold (0.50), and our conservative policy prioritizes internal recovery before outbound transfers; request again once you reach 0.50 SoC.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your latest belief: Neighbors are actively sharing via geographic round-robin; I am in critical need and must request urgent inbound power while minimizing outbound shares until SoC recovers above 50%..
